hero.subtitle: GMVBot empowers solo entrepreneurs (OPC) to build, deploy, and monetize AI agent teams — turning one-person companies into revenue machines.
features.label: CORE CAPABILITIES
features.title: Everything You Need to Build an AI Company
features.subtitle: From creation to monetization, GMVBot handles the entire AI agent lifecycle.
features.card1.title: Create AI Agents
features.card1.desc: Design and configure intelligent agents with custom skills, personalities, and goals — no coding required.
features.card2.title: Simulate a Company
features.card2.desc: Assign roles like CEO, marketer, developer. Your agents collaborate autonomously as a full team.
features.card3.title: Earn Real Revenue
features.card3.desc: Agents execute real tasks — content creation, outreach, sales — generating measurable GMV.
features.card4.title: Join the Network
features.card4.desc: Connect with other OPC founders. Share agents, strategies, and scale together.
how.label: HOW IT WORKS
how.title: From Vision to Revenue in 4 Steps
how.subtitle: A streamlined workflow to get your AI company running.
how.step1.title: Define Your Vision
how.step1.desc: Tell us your business idea, target market, and goals. Our system maps it to an optimal agent architecture.
how.step2.title: Deploy Your Agents
how.step2.desc: Choose from pre-built templates or customize from scratch. Deploy a team of specialized AI agents in minutes.
how.step3.title: Watch Them Work
how.step3.desc: Monitor your agents in real-time. They handle marketing, sales, support, and operations autonomously.
how.step4.title: Collect Revenue
how.step4.desc: Your agents generate real business output. Track GMV, optimize performance, and scale what works.
community.label: COMMUNITY
community.title: Thriving One-Person Companies
community.subtitle: See what solo founders are building with GMVBot.

cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of solo founders already generating revenue with AI agent teams.
